criteria_verification.criterion_text: `src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py` exposes `dispatch_by_capability(tool_name: str, payload_json: str, intent_pattern: str | None = None, timeout_seconds: int = 60) -> str` decorated with `@tool(parse_docstring=True)`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Added @tool(parse_docstring=True) function with the exact signature in src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py:193. TestAC001ToolExposure verifies the BaseTool wrapper exposes the four documented args via args_schema.
criteria_verification.notes: Added @tool(parse_docstring=True) function with the exact signature in src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py:193. TestAC001ToolExposure verifies the BaseTool wrapper exposes the four documented args via args_schema.

criteria_verification.evidence: Docstring transcribed from docs/design/FEAT-JARVIS-002/contracts/API-tools.md §3.1 with hyphens substituted for two en-dashes in the cost/latency line for ruff RUF002 compliance (semantic equivalence preserved). All headings, Args, and Returns sections match. Verified by TestAC002Docstring assertions on Resolution order/Use this tool when/error-string substrings.
criteria_verification.notes: Docstring transcribed from docs/design/FEAT-JARVIS-002/contracts/API-tools.md §3.1 with hyphens substituted for two en-dashes in the cost/latency line for ruff RUF002 compliance (semantic equivalence preserved). All headings, Args, and Returns sections match. Verified by TestAC002Docstring assertions on Resolution order/Use this tool when/error-string substrings.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Resolution: exact `CapabilityToolSummary.tool_name` match wins; else `intent_pattern` substring match on descriptor `role`/`description` with highest-confidence (first match on lexicographic agent_id order for stability); else `ERROR: unresolved — no capability matches tool_name=<x> intent_pattern=<y>`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _resolve_agent_id helper that sorts descriptors by agent_id then iterates: exact CapabilityToolSummary.tool_name match first, then intent_pattern substring on descriptor.role/description. Returns None → ERROR: unresolved string. TestAC003Resolution covers exact match, lex tie-break, intent fallback, and unresolved cases.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _resolve_agent_id helper that sorts descriptors by agent_id then iterates: exact CapabilityToolSummary.tool_name match first, then intent_pattern substring on descriptor.role/description. Returns None → ERROR: unresolved string. TestAC003Resolution covers exact match, lex tie-break, intent fallback, and unresolved cases.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Validates `payload_json` is a JSON object literal (starts with `{`, parses to dict). Non-object / non-JSON → `ERROR: invalid_payload — payload_json is not a JSON object literal`.
criteria_verification.evidence: lstrip-then-startswith('{') guard + json.loads + isinstance(dict) check returns the documented error string verbatim. TestAC004PayloadValidation parametrises 7 invalid payloads (array, string, number, null, garbage, empty, malformed) and asserts the canonical error string.
criteria_verification.notes: lstrip-then-startswith('{') guard + json.loads + isinstance(dict) check returns the documented error string verbatim. TestAC004PayloadValidation parametrises 7 invalid payloads (array, string, number, null, garbage, empty, malformed) and asserts the canonical error string.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Validates `timeout_seconds` in `[5, 600]`. Out of range → `ERROR: invalid_timeout — timeout_seconds must be 5..600, got <n>`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Range guard returns the documented error string with the offending value interpolated. TestAC005TimeoutValidation parametrises out-of-range (0, 1, 4, 601, 10_000, -1) and in-range (5, 60, 600) values.
criteria_verification.notes: Range guard returns the documented error string with the offending value interpolated. TestAC005TimeoutValidation parametrises out-of-range (0, 1, 4, 601, 10_000, -1) and in-range (5, 60, 600) values.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Constructs a real `nats_core.events.CommandPayload` with `command=tool_name`, `args=json.loads(payload_json)`, `correlation_id=new_correlation_id()` (uses TASK-J002-005 helper).
criteria_verification.evidence: Imports new_correlation_id from jarvis.tools._correlation and constructs CommandPayload(command=tool_name, args=parsed_args, correlation_id=correlation_id). TestAC006CommandPayloadConstruction wires a stub hook that captures the CommandPayload and asserts UUID4 shape + args round-trip.
criteria_verification.notes: Imports new_correlation_id from jarvis.tools._correlation and constructs CommandPayload(command=tool_name, args=parsed_args, correlation_id=correlation_id). TestAC006CommandPayloadConstruction wires a stub hook that captures the CommandPayload and asserts UUID4 shape + args round-trip.

criteria_verification.evidence: MessageEnvelope built with the exact kwargs; payload_bytes derived from envelope.model_dump_json(). TestAC007LogLineShape exercises the full path and asserts the rendered log line includes the resolved topic/payload_bytes derived from the envelope.
criteria_verification.notes: MessageEnvelope built with the exact kwargs; payload_bytes derived from envelope.model_dump_json(). TestAC007LogLineShape exercises the full path and asserts the rendered log line includes the resolved topic/payload_bytes derived from the envelope.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Emits exactly one `logger.info` call per invocation with message starting with `LOG_PREFIX_DISPATCH` (= `"JARVIS_DISPATCH_STUB"`) and containing `tool_name=<x> agent_id=<y> correlation_id=<z> topic=agents.command.<y> payload_bytes=<n>` in the rendered line.
criteria_verification.evidence: Single logger.info call uses LOG_PREFIX_DISPATCH constant as %s leading literal with all five required fields as positional args. TestAC007LogLineShape asserts exactly-one anchored log line per invocation and verifies all required fields.
criteria_verification.notes: Single logger.info call uses LOG_PREFIX_DISPATCH constant as %s leading literal with all five required fields as positional args. TestAC007LogLineShape asserts exactly-one anchored log line per invocation and verifies all required fields.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Honours `_stub_response_hook`: unset → returns canned `ResultPayload` JSON with `success=True, result={"stub":True,"tool_name":<x>}, correlation_id=<same>`; `timeout` → `TIMEOUT: agent_id=<y> tool_name=<x> timeout_seconds=<n>`; `specialist_error` → `ERROR: specialist_error — agent_id=<y> detail=<reason>`.
criteria_verification.evidence: Match statement handles all three StubResponse variants plus the unset-hook canned-success path. TestAC008StubResponseHook covers unset/timeout/specialist_error/success cases and asserts each documented return shape.
criteria_verification.notes: Match statement handles all three StubResponse variants plus the unset-hook canned-success path. TestAC008StubResponseHook covers unset/timeout/specialist_error/success cases and asserts each documented return shape.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: No retry inside the tool (DDR-009 §6); error string returned verbatim.
criteria_verification.evidence: No retry/loop logic — every error path returns directly. The function emits a single log line per call (verified by TestAC007).
criteria_verification.notes: No retry/loop logic — every error path returns directly. The function emits a single log line per call (verified by TestAC007).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Concurrent dispatches produce distinct correlation IDs; two parallel invocations yield two distinct `JARVIS_DISPATCH_STUB` log lines, each carrying its own correlation_id.
criteria_verification.evidence: Each call generates its own correlation_id via new_correlation_id() (CSPRNG, no shared state). TestAC009Concurrency spawns 5 threads, asserts 5 distinct correlation_ids in both log lines and ResultPayload returns.
criteria_verification.notes: Each call generates its own correlation_id via new_correlation_id() (CSPRNG, no shared state). TestAC009Concurrency spawns 5 threads, asserts 5 distinct correlation_ids in both log lines and ResultPayload returns.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Seam test: dispatches succeed end-to-end through `assemble_tool_list`-wired supervisor fixture; log capture verifies exactly-one log line per call.
criteria_verification.evidence: End-to-end test via dispatch.dispatch_by_capability.invoke({...}) goes through the @tool BaseTool wrapper and asserts exactly-one anchored log line. assemble_tool_list itself lands in TASK-J002-015; the seam is closed by the bound_registry fixture which assigns to dispatch._capability_registry, the same hook assemble_tool_list will use.
criteria_verification.notes: End-to-end test via dispatch.dispatch_by_capability.invoke({...}) goes through the @tool BaseTool wrapper and asserts exactly-one anchored log line. assemble_tool_list itself lands in TASK-J002-015; the seam is closed by the bound_registry fixture which assigns to dispatch._capability_registry, the same hook assemble_tool_list will use.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Never raises; Pydantic ValidationError on MessageEnvelope construction is caught and returned as `ERROR: validation — <detail>`.
criteria_verification.evidence: try/except around CommandPayload+MessageEnvelope construction catches ValidationError → 'ERROR: validation — <msg>'. Hook invocation wrapped in try/except → 'ERROR: specialist_error — agent_id=<y> detail=<exc>'. TestAC010NeverRaises covers the hook-raises and bad-args paths.
criteria_verification.notes: try/except around CommandPayload+MessageEnvelope construction catches ValidationError → 'ERROR: validation — <msg>'. Hook invocation wrapped in try/except → 'ERROR: specialist_error — agent_id=<y> detail=<exc>'. TestAC010NeverRaises covers the hook-raises and bad-args paths.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `the stack-specific Phase-3 specialist` (Implementation)
